reviews.title: First time I left a hotel early
reviews.text:
This was the first time I have ever chosen to leave a hotel before the end of a stay.

What makes this particularly remarkable is that the issues below occurred during a stay of less than 48 hours.

The resort itself is beautiful. The rooms are spacious and comfortable, the grounds are well maintained, and the spa was excellent. In particular, my massage therapist provided one of the best deep tissue massages I have received in a hotel spa.

Unfortunately, the stay was overshadowed by repeated communication failures and operational shortcomings that fell well below what I would expect from an international five-star Pullman resort.

The most concerning issue involved a food allergy I had disclosed. Despite this, I was later offered food containing that allergen by the chef, suggesting the information had not been properly communicated to the kitchen.

Throughout our stay there were numerous service failures, including housekeeping failing to replenish bottled water, multiple food order errors, significant portions of the restaurant menu being unavailable, slow restaurant service, and repeated situations where requests required multiple follow-ups before being actioned.

The most uncomfortable incident involved privacy. Shortly after interacting with a member of staff, I received a LinkedIn notification showing that an employee of the hotel had viewed my profile. As I had not shared my LinkedIn profile or contact details with staff, this left me uncomfortable and raised concerns about how my information may have been obtained.

There were also several aspects of the property that should be communicated more clearly to guests before booking. The resort is located very close to a mosque, and calls to prayer can be clearly heard from guest rooms, including before sunrise. In addition, we only discovered during our stay that alcoholic beverages are unavailable throughout the resort.

What ultimately disappointed me most was that several concerns were explained away as “cultural differences” rather than being acknowledged as service or communication failures. Having travelled extensively throughout Indonesia, including Bali and Jakarta, I do not believe culture was the issue.

To the hotel’s credit, Front Office Manager *** listened carefully to our concerns and approved a refund for the final night of our stay. Her professionalism was appreciated, although by that stage we had unfortunately lost confidence in the overall experience and chose to move to another hotel.

Beautiful facilities and an excellent spa, but service and operational standards that did not meet our expectations of a five-star Pullman property.
reviews.response:
Dear Karolina,

Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback about your recent stay with us.

First, I would like to sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet your expectations or the standards we aim to provide. I am glad to hear you enjoyed the room, facilities, and especially the spa, but I am truly sorry these positives were affected by the issues you experienced.

I am very concerned about your comment regarding your food allergy. This should have been clearly communicated and properly handled by our team. Please rest assured this will be reviewed carefully with our kitchen and service teams to ensure better communication and guest safety in the future.

I also apologize for the service issues you mentioned, including housekeeping not refilling water, incorrect food orders, limited menu availability, slow service, and having to follow up multiple times. This is not the level of service we expect, and we will address this with the relevant teams immediately.

Regarding

reviews.title: Not the Pullman experience
reviews.text: The hotel is recently opened and processes are not working and staff not fully trained yet. A series of  small annoyances from check in to check out.   Check in process was chaotic as there was many travelers coming at the same time and there were confusion about who's next in line to check in. Nobody assisted with my luggage and when finally checked in and both hands are occupied with my luggage I am offered a welcome drink after waiting 30 minutes.  Room was quite far from the  lobby and luckily I didnt have a lot of heavy luggage to drag around. I had a suite, that looks great, but with a big balcony looking into construction and rubbish at the end of the building. The room was dusty with cob webs. Wifi password written on my key card was wrong, so had to call reception to get correct password. Windows had finger marks on them. Many annoyances and missing small things in the room. No ala carte food available at restaurant. Only buffet, despite confirming ala carte at check in.

reviews.title: Do not go during weekdays
reviews.text:
I went in Dec 2021 for the first time, on weekdays, not weekend or public holidays. It was great, my kids enjoyed the facilities, esp archery, paintball, and wall climbing. We came again on 3rd July 2023, on weekdays and not weekend too. It was summer break for most of schools. This round, however, the activities that my kids enjoyed were all clustered as exclusive activities for weekends. So, generally, kids have nothing much to do, except if you would like to pay additional for other activities. 

Moreover, the activity center is closed after 7pm. The center was not closed at all during our first stay, kids can still play table tennis , basket ball, etc etc after dinner. Swimming pools didn't provide towels after 7pm too. Hence, my kids can only be stuck in the room after 7pm. My kids commented they were bored to death during this 3D2N.

 I would recommend to check with the hotel what are the activities available on your desired dates before making any bookings. It seems like their revised schedule of activities and facilities didn't really welcome guests in weekdays. This is just my personal opinions, i could be wrong too.
reviews.response:

I am sorry that this time your staying experience was not at your expectation please to accept my sincere apologies for the displeasing experience you have encountered with our Activity Center operational hour which open at 7am until 7pm. At Pullman, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer, therefore your feedback is very important to us.  my team and me are working together to improve our service quality to meet the standard, also to improve the quality of services

Thank you for sharing your experience in Pullman  Ciawi Vimala Hills. We appreciate your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

reviews.title: I was expecting better from Pullman
reviews.text:

Négative : lack of information since our check in as this is our first time visiting this place , don’t expect Disneyland resort arrangements in this place , they don’t have fine dinning, alcohol limited to beer, there is no wine and cocktails which usually you will have it in 5 stars resort , no replacement or notification for cancellation of activity on schedule, there is 3 restaurant, 2 bar inside but only 1 restaurant that I can visit which is all day dinning damar restaurants others I’m not sure they are operating for the other restaurant , the food is buffet style and in my opinion as someone who’s often stay for long duration in hotel this is not 5 stars quality, is ok but not exceptional , some presentation didn’t keep the food warm like bacon beef and corn soup , my dinning in room similarly with restaurant the taste is not exceptional for 5 stars , thé water in bathroom didn’t have strong pump which kinda annoying

reviews.text:
2 months close to the easier stage of the ppkm, i decided to take my girls to this outdoor lux hotel. and my experience is not so good when comes to the protocol. i asked for BF in room but they ask me WHY?! i said we are aware of the covid situation and prefer to have BF in room, better be safe than sorry, but they want to put charge on it! i was so dissapointed and i dont think that the hotel is really really tight on the protokol! PLEASE HAVE A REVISION ON YOUR PROTOKOL.


I have stayed again for another staycation. i order dinner at mad cow restaurant. been waitied for an hour which is fine for us, but when we get back to our room, theres no utensils is provided, i asked from the restaurant again and they said need to wait up for a few minutes and turn out to be forver. so i ran to the restaurant and asked for the utensils, they refer me to the damar restaurant, i got so angry and complained that they need to have a good management for serving. also ordering a beer turn out to be 2 hours late!!


PLEASE HAVE A REVISION ON YOUR SERVING and PROTOKOL. even if its outdoor kinda environment hotel STILL you need to follow the PROTOKOL!

Regarding the breakfast policy, we provide buffet breakfast at our restaurant with ALL Safe protocol implementation to ensure we meet local and international standards of hospitality including to reduce 50% restaurant capacity. Sincerely,

Gilles Tressens

reviews.text:

Breakfast food was rather cold (beef bacon, omellette, pizza, etc). One of the staff at the restaurant gave me one piece of sausage when I asked for some (covid 19 procedure). He gave me 1 piece. Did not even bother to ask how many I wanted. I mean I paid a fortune for that breakfast.

And of course the biggest disaster is when my bath tub leaked. Water was all over the room floor since there is no separator between the bathroom and the room itself. My shoes and bags got wet. It was literally a flood on my room.

After much argument, the hotel gave a compensation satisfactory enough for us.

I had high expectations but I'm sorry the experience did not match. It's a 5 star hotel.

reviews.title: Great Staycation
reviews.text:
A great place to stay, a lot of activities for kids and for parents too. We stayed for 3d2n without leaving the hotel at all. Came with a 3 months old baby, baby cot and baby bathtub were provided too. 

However, encountered an unpleasant experience during breakfast on a Saturday morning (it was fine on a weekday). We feel that the cook, cleaners and staff were overwhelmed with huge crowd. Table setting were poor - wasn't cleaned properly, cutlery provided wasn't enough. Had to ask for the complete one several times. 

Food - sautéed mushroom was burnt, quiche was undercooked, pizza was the worst - it was just a thick empty dough, wasn't edible at all. 

Replenishment of plates, glasses and some food were really slow. At some point, there weren't any plates and glasses available at all. This really should be improved and properly managed. 

Some food stations i.e lontong sayur and bakso has a helper that prepares the dish for you, but sometimes they aren't there. Come on, you only have one job to do until 10.30am, and you're missing. 

Overall, loved our stay and definitely will be back

The distance between lobby and our room was way too far, going to the pool and restaurants was something that we really hate. Salak bar was pretty nice but the other restaurants was just  OK. Serving time was too long for a moderate tasting food. I think royal tulip is an overall better experience.

Kind regards,
Gilles Tressens

reviews.title: Service not up to 5 stars
reviews.text:
Overall it is a nice stay with a few setback. 

The breakfast was nice with quite many varieties of food to choose from but the refill of some of the foods were slow. The restaurant was not full which made the whole atmosphere for breakfast relaxing and nice, unfortunately, the food was slow to refill. We have to come back a few times for waffles, ketchup, honey, chocolate syrup, maple syrup, to name a few as it was slow to refill. 

Another thing that really annoy me was when we asked for make up room. We have requested this right before we went for breakfast and we even called again after we get back from breakfast but never seems get noticed. The room was only made up at 1.30 after we got so annoyed and called front desk again.

This should not happen for a 5 star hotel. What makes 5 star is a 5 star is service.

reviews.title: Slow service and lack of transparency
reviews.text: I am disappointed with my experience at this hotel. From the beginning, I was ready to pay for the room I requested, but the hotel was slow to respond. Instead of providing a clear solution, their answers were vague and roundabout. The room that was initially said to be unavailable suddenly became available later—along with an extra upgrade fee that I was expected to pay. This kind of service made me feel inconvenienced, even though all I wanted was a quick response and transparent communication regarding my booking. I hope the hotel improves how they handle guest requests in the future. Not recommended if you’re looking for quick and responsive service.
reviews.response:
Dear Tjioe,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We deeply regret to hear that your experience at Pullman Ciawi Vimala Hills Resort Spa & Convention did not meet your expectations. Please accept our sincere apologies for any inconvenience caused by the delayed response and lack of clarity in our communication regarding your booking and room availability.

We understand the importance of timely and transparent service, and we will take your comments into account as we continue to improve our processes. Rest assured, we are committed to enhancing our guest experience and ensuring more efficient and clear communication in the future.

Your feedback is invaluable, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a more seamless and enjoyable stay.

Sincerely,

Lukky Fadillah 
Guest Experience, Loyalty and Quality Manager

reviews.title: Enjoyable getaway
reviews.positives: Nice spacious rooms with balconies. Modern yet cozy feel. Breakfast was good, with a few staff at the reception very attentive. Cafe Damar that serves breakfast ist really nice. Great to have decaf coffee as option. The game section with pool, karaoke, arcade games was fun.
reviews.negatives: Room for improvement: Buffet was often missing items like cheeses (empty or very sparsely filled) and the Indonesian dishes like ketoprak were not very tasty (street vendors’ are better). At a price of over IDR 300k, I would expect a bit better. Tables were often not ready and dirty. Hallways are very slippery (need to install extended roofing). Games rooms close far too early at only 7pm. Major problem: the door lock malfunctioned and when I reported it, the staff receiving my call said they would charge us for it, without even checking properly. This was extremely annoying and stressful. Fortunately, the skilled and kind Mr. Markus inspected and exchanged the lock, and determined the problem was the hotel’s wooden door frame that had expanded due to humidity/moisture. For the hotel room’s bathroom I suggest changing the shower’s flooring to something with friction to avoid slips, as it’s super slippery. Salak bar has an awesome view but ordering a simple snack takes forever. The spa was superb, probably the best thing about the whole experience!

reviews.title: 3D2N Executive Room, Not Recommended
reviews.text:
1. Saya datang jam 8 malam, late check in tentunya. Di greet dengan sangat tidak ramah. Informasi yang diberikan mengenai breakfast jg ga ada padahal saya request additional bfast. Tolong mbak2 resepsionis lebih ramah untuk menghandle tamu yg datang malam
2. Saya memesan Executive room karena ada MOUNTAIN VIEW. Tapi kamar yang diberikan balkonnya tertutup pohon sehingga NO VIEW AT ALL HAHAHA 
3. Ternyata kamar yang saya dapat terhubung dengan kamar sebelah. Parahnya pintu connecting door ini TIDAK DIKUNCI OLEH PIHAK HOTEL. Ini benar2 keterlaluan.  Dan salahnya saya baru menyadari sehari sebelum kami check out, kalau tau dari awal sudah saya complain
4. Dinding2 dihotel ini sangat tipis sepertinya karena suara dari kamar sebelah sangaaaaat kedengaran. Entah karena connecting door atau bukan tapi ini yang membuat saya tidak nyaman menginap sama sekali.
5. Saya dapat kamar di gedung Ergon, mohon pihak hotel perhatikan fasilitas dan kualitasnya jg, lamput lift redup sekali dan bau, ketika masuk lift selalu rasanya tidak nyaman.
6. Pada saat checkout saya memesan bellboy, berharap dibantu untuk membawa barang2 tentunya, tp bellboy hanya menunggu barang diantar keluat pintu, jd kami yg angkut2 barangnya.

Overall dengan harga yang saya bayar, saya merasa banyak ruginya. Tidak akan saya rekomendasikan untuk yang bawa bayi terutama.

Mungkin sisi positif yang saya suka dari hotel ini, aktifitas yg disediakan cukup banyak jadi ketika menginap disini tidak perlu keluar2 lagi.
reviews.response:
Dear Nadya,

Thank you for your detailed feedback following your recent stay. We apologize for the unfriendly greeting at check-in and the oversight regarding breakfast information. Your comments regarding the room allocation, including the connected door and noise levels, are concerning, and we are actively addressing these issues to improve our guests' experience.

Regarding the facilities in the Egon building, we appreciate your observations about the elevator lights and ambiance, and we are taking steps to rectify these matters promptly.

Your feedback is invaluable to us as we strive to provide exceptional service and accommodations. We sincerely apologize for falling short of your expectations and hope for the opportunity to welcome you back for a more seamless and enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,

Lukky Fadillah
Guest Experience, Loyalty & Quality Manager

reviews.text: The property itself was amazing and super well-maintained, would highly suggest to stay in the main building as we finally requested to move on our 1st day. The villa was pretty and quiet but the water heater was not up to 5-star standard as the water was not even warm. The staff was supportive of the moving request and we were moved to the executive suit which we loved truly! However the staffs were not that friendly and helpful for the other parts of our stay, def need more training on the knowledge of the hotel, such as price for add ons per night, shuttle schedule, etc. The food selection and quality def need to be enhanced for a 5-star hotel, funnily enough the room service tasted much better (we ordered room service throughout our stay). Even simple burger could tasted awful and that was the blandest yellow fried chicken ive ever eaten. Nonetheless we enjoyed our stay and hope the hotel will improve their training of the staffs and quality + selections of the food.

reviews.title: Experience staying at Pullman Ciawi
reviews.text:
My family and I stayed for 3 days and 2 nights at Pullman Ciawi. Overall, the hotel is quite comfortable. However, we had to walk quite a distance from the lobby to our room, and we needed to check the map to find our room for the first time. The hotel is very spacious, with facilities for children that are quite complete starting from bicycles (unfortunately, there is only one bicycle for children, and my child didn't get to use it at all during our 3-day stay; it would be better to increase the quantity) to Xbox games, billiards (the table is not well maintained), arcade games, ping pong tables, etc. 

I found the room to be quite comfortable, but the curtain in the shower area doesn't close perfectly on the sides, so it can still be seen a bit from the room area. Each room has a balcony overlooking the garden and lush trees, which is the main advantage of the rooms at Pullman Ciawi. 

For breakfast, it is quite delicious and comprehensive. However, the quality of the fried food served needs to be improved. The fried kwetiau and fried noodles cooked on the spot taste good. The other menu options are quite complete, ranging from Western food, sushi, meatballs, etc. 

For the swimming pool area, there are a total of 4 pools with different areas, and we had to walk quite a distance from the room. The cleanliness of the pools needs to be improved, especially when there are a lot of hotel guests. Dry leaves and branches are scattered on the water's surface. The cleaning staff should be more active so that the cleanliness of the pool area is maintained. 

The gym is not very large but sufficiently equipped. Unfortunately, there are no free whirlpool and sauna facilities for guests at this 5-star Pullman hotel. 

In conclusion, our family's experience staying at Pullman Ciawi was quite enjoyable.
reviews.response:
Dear Ibu Selvia,

reviews.title: Amazing Location, Clean, but confirm Restaurant Hours
reviews.text:
Very nice location - peace and quite, yet not too far from the city. The resort is very clean and very comfortable and the staff are friendly and for the most part professional. Facilities are very children friendly and we were quite happy with our stay (we stayed in the hotel and didn't go anywhere for the whole stay).

There was one very unpleasant experience that I had to go through. We had decided to sleep in and left the room at around 11:00AM to get some food for me and my 6-year-old boy. However, the operational hours of the restaurants were poorly communicated. The pool side restaurant was open at 10:00AM, but refused to serve any food until 12:00PM. I was directed to the Damar restaurant as it supposedly had all-day dining. However, they also refused to serve any food and directed us to a third restaurant, Salak. When entering Salak, they also refused to serve any food until 12:00PM and we were told to just have in-room dining. We were also planning to just walk-in tot he steakhouse Mad Cow on-site. Turns out, the restaurant was also closed for lunch and only open for dinner. For such a high-profile hotel, was quite disappointed with how poorly communicating the operating hours were for the restaurants.

Make sure to ask about restaurant hours and what's open and closed as they seem to just decide on the spot without communicating it to the guests.

reviews.title: Great room, bad experience.
reviews.text:
The resort is huge!  The room was spacious, however the floor seemed scratched and dirty. 
The usb plug in the room dont work very well, i left my device charging overnight but i found the device not charged in the morning. 
No netflix / youtube on tv. 
Hairdryer was a joke. 

It rained when we stayed, the noise was quite loud. Mind you we stayed on the second floor. So it was a bit weird to hear that much noise. 

The room isn’t soundproof. We could easily hear footsteps and chatter from the front door. So disturbing. 

The padi pool bar was BOOKED for a private event during our stay,  they WOULD NOT SERVE ANYONE AT THE POOL WHICH I FOUND VERY STUPID. We were hungry but we couldnt eat anything by the pool. 

The pool was adequate, shaped awkwardly, they have floaties. 
The pool was shaded by trees, so the were debris on the pool. I found no one cleaning up the pool, a tiny bit dissapointed. But water was clear. 

The customer service could be better, usually the staff would ask if you’d like towels, but here when we asked the staff, we were directed to take the towels ourselves on the other side of the OTHER POOL.  Yes. Other pool. So we had to walk all the way to take towels. 

We planned to have dinner on damar at 9 pm, the info given on tv says they’re open till midnight. But when we arrived at 9.30 they said the restaurants are closed by then! So we were left HUNGRY AGAIN, and we had to order in room dining. 

The resort itself feels more tropical than cool mountain vibe. It’s not hot, but it’s not cool either. 

I stayed at royal tulip gunung geulis the day earlier and i love royal tulip more. I personally tends more toward quite, isolated, cool mountain air vibe.

reviews.title: Honeymoon turned into Sickbed.
reviews.text:
Pros: This resorts is massive! and so was the room. Great health & safety measures and excellent service. During our stay, i required medical attention due to injury, the hotel staff was able to bring a nurse and doctor in the room to help me. Good for honeymooners and couples looking for getaway.
The resort has Whatsapp to message your needs to the operator. The reply was quick every time. 

Cons: We have plenty! 
We requested honeymoon decoration with welcome cake. Unfortunetly, none of that was done and i was very disappointed. However, they did the deco next day. This is a disappointement because i emailed the resort multiple times to confirm the decor. 

In addition, our Room door failed to open few days after our stay. We were very tired from a long day out and wanted to rest. We had to wait outside the room for 30min until hotel staff could open the door for us and overide the door electronics for another 10min. 

Furthermore, the food is expense with limited portions. Especially western foods. 2x additional types of taxes are charges before the final bill. 

Theres more disappoint. My wife and i decided to go to the Spa after another long tiring day out. I requested a foot and head massage. Instead, i got a foot and hand massage. 

Theres more horror to my honeymoon; My wife and I ate food at Talaga Sampireun (not under Pullman Management) and i got severly sick for 5 days resulted in checking-out from the resort before out original check-out date. We are happy the manager helped us get refund. 

The Resorts managements needs a bit of work. The communication between, Operations, Receptionist, Managements, and resorts Whatsapp dont collaborate. I had to repeat myself many times along these channels. I expected a fast checkout due to illness, however, none of the staff knew i was checking out late due to illness, and was told to wait before finally being cleared off.  

And lastly, i expect a much higher level of service and fuildity with communication from a
reviews.response:

Firstly, we would like to thank you for choosing our resort as your holiday getaway in Bogor. We greatly appreciate the time you took to share your experience with us. 

We are so delighted to read that you enjoyed our resort especially with our spacious room, and the agile service from our team member. Nevertheless, it is with much regret to learn the inconvenience you have encountered during your stay with us.

reviews.title: A lush luxury hotel near Bogor city
reviews.text:
I had 2 nights stay in Pullman Ciawi Vimala Hills. The location is easy to reach eventhough it is located in the traffic jam area of Gadog. There are a lot of alternative route that can take you there without having to wait for Gadog traffic jam. I suggest you to take Jalan Pertanian and go into Vimala Hills from the backdoor. There are signs everywhere so don’t worry. The surrounding is very lush, they have 3 swimming pools but we spent most of the time in the family pool near Damar restaurant. There were pool party every morning at 9 am made it more fun for children playing water in the morning. The room itself is so spacious. I love how they separate walk in closet, toilet and shower area make it very easy to move around. The bed is comfy and so the round sofa. It was unique. The interior is nice and the light ambience is also warm. Everything in the room was so perfect, clean, and comfortable eventho we only booked the Deluxe one. There are many activities in the hotel that makes our staycation doesn’t feel dull at all. We played in their mini timezone, take a ride to vimala hill surrounding with e-bike (not free) but there is also a free option. We got 1 free photo with a frame so that we can explore nice surrounding of the hotel. The breakfast is good but not too many options available. The only downside of the hotel is the Mad Cow. I had my high expectation for this restaurant but it let us down. I recommend you to take dinner somewhere else.

We may try the villa options soon as I want to bring larger family group here.

Thank you Pullman Vimala Hills. Keep up the good work and please improve the Mad Cow
reviews.response:
Dear Rizka, 

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review of your stay at Pullman Ciawi Vimala Hills Resort Spa & Convention.

We are delighted to hear that you had an enjoyable stay and that our location, amenities, and spacious room met your expectations. It's wonderful to know that you and your family had fun at the family pool and enjoyed the various activities, including the e-bike ride and mini timezone. We’re also pleased to hear that the room layout and comfort added to your overall experience.

We truly appreciate your feedback about breakfast and the Mad Cow restaurant. Your comments have been shared with the respective teams, and we will look into ways to improve both the dining options and the experience at the restaurant.

We are excited about the possibility of welcoming you and your larger family group in the future, and we hope to provide an even more memorable experience on your next visit.

Thank you again for choosing Pullman Ciawi Vi

reviews.title: Child-friendly hotel
reviews.text: This was my first time trying a staycation at Pullman on the recommendation of a friend who often stays there. I was disappointed and will not return. First, I received the room key during check-in almost at 3:00 PM, while other hotels under the Accor Group allow check-in at 12:30 PM. Then, the bathtub in the room was yellow. For breakfast, we were informed that it would be at Madcow from 6:00 AM to 10:00 AM due to the hotel being fully occupied. My family and I arrived at the breakfast location at 9:00 AM and were not allowed in because it was still full. The staff could not provide assurance on when we could enter. I waited until 9:20 AM, and the staff still could not guarantee entry, with no special consideration for suite rooms. After complaining for the second time, we were finally directed to another place for breakfast, which turned out to have incomplete and messy food and beverage stalls. The staff even grumbled because of my complaint. However, for those looking for a place for children, this hotel has many children's games, but the large swimming pool has no heating technology, so it is quite cold. Thank you, Pullman Ciawi, for the first and last experience because we will not return to this hotel again, just once is enough.
reviews.response:
Dear Yanita,

Terima kasih atas ulasan Anda dan telah memilih Pullman Ciawi Vimala Hills Resort Spa & Convention untuk staycation Anda. Kami menyesal mendengar bahwa pengalaman Anda tidak sesuai harapan.

Kami mohon maaf atas keterlambatan check-in dan kondisi bathtub yang kurang baik. Mengenai sarapan di Mad Cow, kami memahami ketidaknyamanan yang terjadi akibat kapasitas penuh. Kami berusaha mengatur waktu dan tempat sarapan sebaik mungkin, namun kami mohon maaf atas kurangnya informasi serta ketidaklengkapan makanan di lokasi alternatif.

Kami menghargai masukan Anda, khususnya terkait fasilitas anak yang memenuhi harapan. Ulasan ini sangat penting bagi kami untuk melakukan evaluasi dan perbaikan layanan di masa mendatang.

Terima kasih atas kunjungan Anda, dan kami berharap dapat menyambut Anda kembali dengan pengalaman yang lebih baik.

Salam hangat,

Lukky Fadillah

reviews.title: One-Stop Family Place
reviews.text:
I have been hearing a lot about Pullman Ciawi and finally, after 2 years, I was able to experience it firsthand!
- The room is awesome - spacious bed and clean environment. 
- The staff are very friendly and accommodating to your every need!
- Love the family activities that they provide: archery, mini-golf, biking, playroom areas with a billiard and pingpong tables and a all-you-can-shoot basketball arcade hoop.
- Great coffee maker blends available in each room!
- Photo-sessions provided for every guest!

What could be improved?
- Food selection can be a bit pricey -ranging from IDR 150k to IDR 300K per meal per person.
- Food taste can also be improved.
- Feeling of being trapped inside due to the one-way streets done by the main-road - well, not Pullman's fault though.

reviews.title: family-friendly staycation near Jakarta
reviews.text:
Staying 1 night after the school holidays ended. The parking building is quite far, so we had to use the buggy that is always on standby to take us back and forth from the parking lot to the hotel. 

I stored my suitcase in the storage room since I arrived early during checkout time, the lobby was very crowded, and the bellboys were also busy. The check-in and check-out processes were quite fast and all the staff were friendly. 

When I wanted to have lunch at the hotel, it turned out that Damar Restaurant only offered AYCE buffet, while other options were available at the outdoor poolside restaurant (the rainy conditions and some smokers made it uncomfortable). Luckily, I got an early check-in, so I could order room service (fried noodles and betutu chicken were worth the price). 

The suitcase had not been delivered by almost 3 PM, so I asked the bellboy about it, and fortunately, it was brought in less than half an hour. 

Due to the rain, we could only play indoors, and the kids' club and teen club were crowded. 

For outdoor activities, there are plenty, including feeding deer, rabbits, and ducks using the tram available in the morning and afternoon (the food is free, no extra payment required). The tram driver, Mr. Alvin, was friendly with the kids. There were various toys in the kids' club, but many of them were also damaged. 

There was a free photo booth, but because it was crowded, I did not take it. 

For dinner, we also went to Damar Restaurant, and several times the waiters seemed confused in delivering orders, so they wandered around first before asking if this was our order (shouldn't orders be written according to their table numbers to avoid wandering around matching orders with other tables?). 

The breakfast variations were plentiful, even featuring an ice cream corner. If you don't want to have breakfast at the hotel, across the hotel, there is Kopi Oey and Indomaret which is quite complete. There is also Talaga Sampireun restaurant near the hotel. 

The hotel is very large, so a map was provided, unfortunately, there weren't too many directions, so to find the kids' club, I had to ask several times.
reviews.response:
Dear Jane, 
Terima kasih karena telah menginap bersama kami dan atas ulasan yang anda bagikan. Sangat menyenangkan bagi kami mengetahui bahwa Anda begitu menikmati setiap pengalaman di resor kami. Khususnya dengan fasilitas yang lengkap, aktifitas yang beragam dan pemandangan yang dapat kami berikan serta perkebunan yang kami rawat. Komentar anda mengenai pelayanan tim restaurant kami yang keliru telah kami catat dan Saya tindak lanjuti bersama tim terkait. Sekali lagi kami ucapkan terimakasih dan kami tunggu kunjungan Anda kembali di resort kami untuk pengalaman yang lebih menyenangkan.

Hormat Saya, 

Gilles Tressens 
General Manager

reviews.text: 5-star hotel with good facilities, there is a warm family pool, plus 2 swimming pools for serious swimming. Kids' playground, kids' club with various activities, so children will definitely enjoy the vacation. Kids have a play area with games, basketball, etc., and there is archery too, a 1.5 km jogging track, gym, and sauna. A complete package to stay here. You might not want to leave the hotel. One night is a bit short. Staying here for 2 nights, the food is delicious, especially breakfast. If staying with kids, choose deluxe as the bed is bigger, a Hollywood kingsize compared to the executive type. Comfortable for sleeping with 2 kids. The pool is quite far. If you want a honeymoon, choose executive near the pool, there is a bathtub, but the bed is a bit smaller compared to deluxe even though both are kingsize.
reviews.response:
Dear Andre, 

Thank you for sharing such a detailed and wonderful review of your stay with us on your recent visit at Pullman Ciawi Vimala Hills Resort Spa and Convention. 

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our 5-star facilities, including the family warm pool, two additional swimming pools for serious swimmers, kids playground, and the kids club with its varied activities. It’s great to know that the children loved the games, basketball, archery, jogging track, gym, and sauna—truly a complete package for a memorable family holiday!

We appreciate your helpful tips on room choices, recommending the Deluxe room for families with children due to the larger king-size Hollywood bed, and the Executive room for honeymooners who prefer proximity to the pool and a bathtub. We’re also glad you enjoyed our delicious breakfast and found your stay comfortable enough to not want to leave the hotel.

Thank you once again for your thoughtful feedback. We look forward to welcoming you and you

reviews.title: Staycation
reviews.text:
Did a staycation with kids. They enjoyed it. From swimming pool, kids activities, tram ride to feed the animals, game room. The whole day spent were full of activites. Well recomended! The process from the check in desk wasn’t pleasant though. The man couldn’t smile a bit and said that we should have booked our children (7, 8 and 11 years old) under adults to count free breakfast. We booked rooms with breakfast but could only enjoy it for 2 adults. We had to pay for our 3 children. Their hotel policy to count as children were under 6 years old.  
But besides that, other staff were incredibly friendly.  Would definitely stay there again. Just hope I don’t bump into the same man at check in again.
reviews.response:
Dear Nurul,

Thank you for sharing your experience at Pullman Ciawi Vimala Hills Resort Spa & Convention. We are delighted that your children enjoyed the swimming pool, kids' activities, tram ride to feed the animals, and game room.

We apologize for the inconvenience during check-in. According to our records, your booking through the online travel agent included breakfast one adult each room. Our policy states that children under 5 years old dine for free, while those aged 6 to 12 are charged at 50% of the breakfast rate. We regret any inconvenience this caused and apologize for the staff member’s demeanor, which did not meet our standards.

We are pleased that the rest of our staff provided friendly service. Your feedback is valuable and will be shared with our team to ensure continuous improvement.

Thank you for recommending our hotel. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for a more seamless experience.

Warm regards,

Lukky Fadillah
GE, Loyalty & Quality Manager

reviews.title: Pullman Vimala Hills is a haven where the spirit of Indonesia embraces you
reviews.positives:
A Cultural Awakening: Breakfast at Pullman Vimala Resort, Indonesia

Breakfast at The Vimala is a sensory journey into the heart of Indonesian culture. Surrounded by lush landscapes and the gentle sounds of nature, the setting blends natural beauty with traditional design—carved teakwood, stone accents, and the scent of frangipani in the air.

Rooted deeply in local tradition yet elevated with modern flair, the breakfast spread is a true representation of the region’s rich culinary heritage. From nasi goreng kampung, bubur ayam, and colorful kue tradisional, all prepared with fresh local ingredients.

Service is flawless—warm, intuitive, and proud of every dish’s story. Breakfast here isn’t just a meal—it’s a beautifully plated expression of Indonesian hospitality, tradition, and culinary artistry.
